tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod 0755 /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin//find && ls -l /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/find
-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 297288 Dec 11  2024 /usr/bin/curl
-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 204264 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/find
-rwxr-xr-x 1 root root 432048 Apr  8  2024 /usr/bin/tar
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
